user.title: Generac Mobile Link
user.description: Enter your Mobile Link username (email). The next step explains how to copy a session cookie from your browser.

login_guidance.title: Copy your Mobile Link cookie
login_guidance.description:
### Before you start
- Use **Chrome** or **Edge** on a computer.
- Log in at [{login_url}]({login_url}) as **{username}**.
- Wait until the **dashboard shows your propane tank(s)**.

### Open Developer Tools
1. Press **F12** → **Network** tab.
2. Click **Fetch/XHR**.
3. Optional: enable **Preserve log**, then press **Ctrl+R**.

### Select the best request
**Recommended:** `list` → `/api/v2/Apparatus/list` with status **200**.

This is the request Home Assistant uses. Its **Preview** tab should show JSON with your tank name and `FuelLevel`.

**Do not use these for first-time setup:**
- `/api/v1/Subscription/payment/...` (status **204**, empty response)
- `/api/v4/Subscription/details/...`
- `Account`, `MessageCenter`, `dashboard`, CSS/JS/fonts

The cookie is usually the same on all API calls, but `Apparatus/list` lets you confirm the session works before pasting.

### Copy the full cookie value
1. Select the request.
2. Open **Headers** → **Request Headers**.
3. Find **`cookie`**.
4. Copy the **entire value** from the first `visid_incap_...` through the end.

Your cookie should include **all** of these parts:
- `.AspNetCore.Cookies=chunks-2`
- `.AspNetCore.CookiesC1=...` (very long)
- `.AspNetCore.CookiesC2=...` (very long)
- `visid_incap_...`, `incap_ses_...`, and related Imperva entries

If you only copy part of `CookiesC1`, authentication will fail.

**Easier option:** right-click the request → **Copy** → **Copy as cURL**, then paste the whole command here.

### Paste below

select_tanks.title: Select propane tanks
select_tanks.description: Choose which propane tanks to add to Home Assistant.

reauth_guidance.title: Re-authenticate Mobile Link
reauth_guidance.description:
Your Mobile Link session has expired for **{username}**.

1. Log in again at [{login_url}]({login_url}).
2. Open **F12 → Network → Fetch/XHR** and refresh the dashboard.
3. Select **`list`** → `/api/v2/Apparatus/list` (status **200**).
4. Copy the **full** `cookie` value from **Request Headers** (include `.AspNetCore.CookiesC1` and `CookiesC2`), or paste **Copy as cURL**.
5. Paste it below.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid or expired cookie. Log in again and copy a fresh cookie from /api/v2/Apparatus/list.
error.incomplete_cookie: Cookie looks incomplete. Copy the entire cookie value, including .AspNetCore.CookiesC1 and CookiesC2.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to Mobile Link. Check your network connection and cookie.
error.no_tanks_selected: Select at least one propane tank.

abort.already_configured: This Mobile Link account is already configured.
abort.no_tanks: No propane tanks were found for this account.
